name: False Sharing (avoidance)
def: When independent variables on the same cache line cause cores to ping-pong ownership, killing scaling.
problem: Diagnose and remove silent multicore slowdowns from unrelated data sharing a cache line.
mechanism: Cache coherence works at cache-line granularity; writes by different cores to the same line invalidate each other. Fix by padding/aligning hot per-thread data to separate lines.
limits: Hard to spot in shared structures
failures: Per-thread counters packed in one array
Lock + protected data on the same line
myths: "A correctness bug" — it is purely a performance pathology
